spec_match.rationale: Logs real textarea events and compares the mouseup range with the click-time range.

interactive.rationale: The log controls let users adjust event granularity while interacting with a real textarea.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the Selection History Log concept.

edge_cases.rationale: The key-finding box reports whether the browser exhibits Chrome 150 ordering or stale click selection.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Dashboard styling follows the showcase design system.

summary: The missing ChromeStatus hard-rule reference was added.
